nav_airdrop_desc: Send tokens to all holders of another token
footer_tagline_before: A market-cap & analytics site for BCH CashTokens. Visit
footer_tagline_after: to learn more about Bitcoin Cash.
metrics_tracked_tip: Every CashToken category our indexer has ever seen since activation block 792,772 — fungible and non-fungible, active or long-dead. Minus the ones hidden by moderation.
metrics_listed_tip: Subset of Tracked — tokens you can buy or sell right now via at least one venue: an active Cauldron or Fex AMM price, or an open Tapswap P2P listing. Click the number to filter the directory to just these.
metrics_listed_title: Tokens with an active Cauldron / Fex AMM price or an open Tapswap P2P listing
metrics_tvl_tip: BCH-side reserve across every Cauldron + Fex pool, priced in USD. Cauldron portion is the canonical aggregate from indexer.cauldron.quest (refreshed every 30 min); Fex portion is summed across every pool we scan on-chain. Single-side (conservative; industry convention doubles this). Tapswap excluded — P2P intent, not pooled liquidity.
metrics_new24h_tip: Categories whose genesis transaction was mined in the last 24 hours. Click to view them.
metrics_new24h_title: Tokens minted in the last 24 hours
metrics_txs24h_tip: CashToken-bearing transactions across all categories in the last 24 hours — every block tx that emits at least one token output (transfers, mints, multi-token movements; each tx counts once). Pure on-chain count from the verbose block JSON. Click for the FAQ explainer.
metrics_txs24h_title: CashToken-bearing txs across all categories, last 24h
metrics_block_tip: Latest BCH block our tail worker has scanned for new CashToken categories and Tapswap listings. Typically sub-second behind tip via ZMQ. Click to open the per-block economics dashboard.
metrics_bch_tip: BCH spot price in USD, refreshed every 5 minutes. Used across the site to convert BCH-denominated prices (Cauldron, Tapswap) to USD.
cta_heading: Follow Panmoni on X for BCH & CashTokens updates
cta_sub: The team behind TokenStork — product launches, dev notes, and ecosystem signal.
error_404_subline: The URL you tried doesn't match anything on the site. If you pasted a category hex, double-check the 64 characters — one wrong digit is a different token.
error_410_subline: This token category was removed from the directory by moderation. We keep the list of removals public on /moderated for transparency.
error_500_subline: Something went wrong on our end. We're probably already looking at it; if not, refresh in a minute.
error_410_footer_after: for the full list of hidden categories with reason and date.
meta_title: Token Stork: Discover, Track and Analyze BCH Cash Tokens
meta_description: Track BCH CashTokens market cap and more with TokenStork.
login_h1: Sign in with your BCH wallet
login_intro: No email, no password. Connect via WalletConnect — your wallet handles the cryptography; we just verify the signature and issue a session.
login_wallet_support_before: Works with Cashonize, Paytaca, Zapit, and any other wallet that supports the
login_manual_hint: For users without a WalletConnect-aware wallet — paste your cashaddr and a signed-message signature.
login_wc_awaiting: Approve the connection in your wallet. The QR code modal should be open above this page.
login_wc_signing: Approve the message signature in your wallet…
login_cashaddr_hint: Mainnet P2PKH only. The cashaddr you enter must match the address whose private key you'll sign with.
login_step1: Step 1 — Sign this message in your wallet
login_how_to_sign: How to sign in popular wallets
login_wallet_ec_steps: Tools → Sign / Verify Message → paste address + message → Sign.
login_wallet_cashonize_steps: Settings → Sign Message → choose your wallet → paste message → Sign.
login_wallet_paytaca_steps: Settings → Sign Message → select wallet → paste message → Sign.
login_copy_sig_before: Copy the resulting signature (a base64 string ending in
login_why_p1: The address you sign with becomes your account. We store nothing the wallet didn't already prove you control — no email, no recovery phone, no password to lose.
login_why_p2: This unlocks the wallet-tied watchlist, future portfolio tracking, and per-token annotations. Until those land, login doesn't gate any of the directory data — it's all public.
login_err_not_configured: WalletConnect is not configured on this deployment. Set PUBLIC_WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID and rebuild, or sign manually below.
pubbcmr_meta_description: Publish or update a Bitcoin Cash Metadata Registry (BCMR) entry for a CashToken category whose authority NFT you hold.
pubbcmr_intro_before: Give your CashToken a name, symbol, icon, and description by publishing a Bitcoin Cash Metadata Registry entry on-chain. Only the wallet holding a category's
pubbcmr_intro_after: can publish — that's how the protocol prevents impersonation.
pubbcmr_indexer_err_body: We use it to find which categories your wallet can publish for. Refresh to retry — this usually clears in seconds.
pubbcmr_abandon_confirm: Abandon this draft? You can always start a new one.
pubbcmr_no_eligible_body1: This wallet doesn't currently hold the authority NFT for any category we've indexed.
pubbcmr_no_eligible_body2_before: If you just minted a token, give the indexer a moment to pick it up and refresh. Or
pubbcmr_no_eligible_body2_after: — after minting, return here to publish its BCMR.
bcmrw_s1_desc_before: What this token is called and how it appears in wallets + explorers. These fields go into the BCMR JSON as the registry's
bcmrw_upload_hint: Pre-fills the form from an existing BCMR JSON file
bcmrw_decimals_hint: 0 for indivisible (NFT-style or whole-units), up to 8 for finely-divisible.
bcmrw_description_ph: A brief explanation of this token's purpose.
bcmrw_v_name_long: Name must be 80 characters or fewer.
bcmrw_v_ticker_long: Ticker must be 12 characters or fewer.
bcmrw_v_decimals: Decimals must be an integer in 0-8.
bcmrw_v_desc_long: Description must be 500 characters or fewer.
bcmrw_s2_desc_a: Where to find your token's icon image. Paste an
bcmrw_s2_desc_c: reference. The image should be a square PNG or WebP at 256×256 or larger. Leave blank to publish without an icon.
bcmrw_v_icon_long: Icon URI must be 1024 characters or fewer.
bcmrw_v_icon_scheme: Icon URI must start with https://, http://, or ipfs:// (or leave blank).
bcmrw_s3_desc_before: We'll build the canonical BCMR JSON from your inputs and compute its
bcmrw_s3_desc_after: — that hash will be committed on-chain alongside the publication URI, so any consumer can verify the JSON bytes match what you intended to publish.
bcmrw_ipfs_key_ph: Pinata JWT or Lighthouse API key
bcmrw_ipfs_key_note: Saved to localStorage — never sent to Token Stork.
bcmrw_err_enter_pinata: Enter your Pinata API key below.
bcmrw_s4_desc_before: Upload the canonical JSON from step 3 to your own IPFS / Pinata / Lighthouse / any HTTPS host you control, then paste the URL here.
bcmrw_s4_desc_strong: Your own host stays the canonical source
bcmrw_pub_url_hint: HTTPS or ipfs:// accepted. If your host uses redirects, paste the final URL. Maximum 8 MiB body.
bcmrw_verify_match: Hosted bytes match the canonical content hash.
bcmrw_verify_mismatch_help: The bytes returned by your host don't match what step 3 canonicalized. Re-download the canonical JSON from step 3 and upload exactly those bytes (any whitespace difference changes the hash).
bcmrw_backup_title: Optional: submit a backup copy to tokenstork.com.
bcmrw_backup_body_after: after operator approval, so consumers can fall back to our copy if your own host is ever unreachable. Your IPFS / HTTPS host remains the canonical source — this is just an additional mirror. Approval is operator-discretionary.
bcmrw_backup_ok: ✓ Backup submitted. The operator will review; approval is independent of the on-chain publication, which proceeds either way.
bcmrw_s5_desc_before: We build the unsigned transaction that spends your category's authority NFT, emits a new authority NFT to your wallet, and attaches an
bcmrw_s5_desc_after: locator. Token Stork can orchestrate the signing via WalletConnect — or you can build, sign manually, and paste the hex below.
bcmrw_checking_wallet_long: Checking your wallet for sufficient BCH and the authority NFT…
bcmrw_consolidate_hint: Consolidate plain BCH into one spendable UTXO
bcmrw_resolve_issues: Resolve the issues above to enable one-click signing, or use the manual flow below.
bcmrw_click_check: Click "Check wallet" to see if you're ready to publish.
bcmrw_sign_hex_hint: Sign this hex in your wallet (Paytaca, Electron Cash, Cashonize, etc.). Then paste the signed hex below.
bcmrw_signed_hex_ph: Paste signed hex from your wallet here…
bcmrw_err_paste_hex: Paste the signed tx hex from your wallet first.
bcmrw_err_hex_format: Signed hex must be even-length and hex-only (0-9, a-f).
bcmrw_err_unsigned: This is the unsigned transaction. Sign it in your wallet first.
bcmrw_s6_body: The transaction is in the mempool. Our on-chain BCMR walker runs hourly — your token's name, symbol, icon, and description will start appearing on the directory within ~1 hour of the next walker tick after this tx confirms.
bcmrw_s6_placeholder: This step shows after a successful broadcast. Complete step 5 first.
bcmrw_abandon_confirm: Abandon this draft? You can start a fresh one for this category afterwards.
airdrop_intro_before: Send tokens you hold to every wallet that holds another token. Equal split or proportional to recipient holdings. Built on local
airdrop_s1_q: Which of YOUR tokens are you airdropping?
airdrop_no_tokens: Your wallet doesn't currently hold any non-moderated CashTokens. Receive some on this address (or wait for the next 6h enrich tick if you just received a token) and come back.
airdrop_in_wallet_suffix: in your wallet. Click one to airdrop:
airdrop_paste_hex_summary: Or paste a category hex directly
airdrop_err_not_hold: You don't currently hold this token.
airdrop_s2_q: Whose holders should receive? Type a name, symbol, or paste a category hex. They'll all get a share of your tokens.
airdrop_search_label: Search by name, symbol, or hex
airdrop_equal_desc: Every holder gets the same amount.
airdrop_weighted_desc: Proportional to each holder's balance + NFT count of the recipient token.
airdrop_dust_hint: Default 800. Below 800: recipients may need to add their own funding to spend the token UTXO. Below 546: rejected by standard relays.
airdrop_signed_hex_ph: Paste the signed transaction hex here
airdrop_err_hex_even: Signed hex must be even-length hex.
airdrop_err_snapshot_advanced: Recipient holder set changed mid-airdrop. Halting; visit the receipt page to redraft remaining chunks.
mint_meta_description: Mint your own BCH CashToken (FT, NFT, or hybrid) directly from your wallet.
mint_intro: Create your own fungible token, NFT, or hybrid on the Bitcoin Cash chain. Walk through the six-step wizard, sign the genesis transaction with your wallet, and your category appears on the directory within minutes.
mint_auth_body: Minting a CashToken means signing an on-chain transaction with the BCH address that owns the funding UTXO. We don't store your private key, we don't email you, and we don't ask for any other identity — your wallet IS the account.
mint_auth_lost_key: Lost key = lost account. That's an intended property; not a bug.
mint_save_failed: Couldn't save your draft on the last step transition — your progress is in memory only. A refresh will lose it. Next save attempt will retry automatically.
mint_s1_desc: CashTokens has three flavors. The type is part of the genesis transaction and can't be changed once minted.
mint_type_ft_desc: A divisible token with a fixed total supply, like USD or BTC. Choose this for currencies, governance tokens, points.
mint_type_nft_desc: Each token is unique with optional commitment data. Choose this for art, collectibles, identity claims.
mint_type_hybrid_desc: Both at once. The minting NFT controls future FT issuance — common for governance + treasury tokens.
mint_s2_desc: What this token is called and what it looks like. Will be published as BCMR metadata so wallets and explorers display it consistently.
mint_description_ph: A sentence or two for the BCMR metadata.
mint_icon_uri_ph: https://… or ipfs://… — leave empty to publish without an icon
mint_pin_icon_summary: Pin an icon file to IPFS
mint_pin_icon_desc_a: Upload a static raster (PNG / JPEG / WebP, ≤ 2 MiB) directly from your browser to
mint_pin_icon_desc_c: using your own API key. The file never reaches Token Stork's server. Once pinned, the resulting
mint_pin_icon_desc_d: populates the Icon URI field above.
mint_s3_ft_desc_a: The total supply minted at genesis. This is the only mint event unless you keep the minting NFT (FT+NFT hybrid). Up to 2
mint_cap_none: None — pure NFT, can't mint or mutate
mint_s4_desc_b: is the txid of a UTXO you own at
mint_s4_desc_c: We'll auto-detect suitable UTXOs from your wallet below. The recipient is automatically set to your authenticated address.
mint_checking_utxos: Checking your wallet for suitable UTXOs…
mint_paste_manual_note: You can still paste a txid manually below.
mint_plain_cta_rest: Consolidate into one vout=0 with one wallet tap.
mint_click_refresh: Click Refresh to scan your wallet.
mint_unsigned_note: Note: the input's unlocking script is empty here — your wallet fills it during signing. That's why the hex below is shorter than the typical 220+ byte signed tx.
mint_sign_then_a: Sign this in your wallet, then paste the
mint_s6_appear: Your token will appear on the directory within ~10 minutes (one block + sync-tail tick). Until then, the BCMR file below is what you publish so wallets and explorers know its identity.
mint_s6_download_a: Download the BCMR JSON below, host it at any HTTPS URL you control (or pin it to IPFS and use the
mint_s6_download_b: form), then submit it to BCMR registries so wallets pick up your token's identity.
mint_v_pick_type: Pick a token type to continue.
mint_v_ticker_long: Ticker must be 12 characters or fewer.
mint_v_decimals: Decimals must be 0–8 per CashTokens spec.
mint_v_supply_required: Total supply is required for fungible tokens.
mint_v_supply_int: Total supply must be a whole number.
mint_v_commitment_hex: NFT commitment must be hex (0-9, a-f).
mint_v_commitment_len: NFT commitment max 40 bytes (80 hex chars).
mint_err_utxo_timeout: UTXO fetch timed out after 20 seconds. BlockBook may be slow — try again.
mint_warn_outpoint_notfound: This txid was not found at vout=0 in your wallet. The genesis tx MUST spend vout=0 — if you control a different output of this transaction, it will not work. Send BCH to yourself first to create a vout=0 UTXO.
mint_warn_outpoint_unverified: This txid could not be verified against your wallet. Make sure it is the txid of a transaction where you control output #0 (vout=0).
mint_err_derive_lock: Could not derive locking script from your address: {detail}
mint_err_no_plain: No plain-BCH UTXOs available for consolidation.
mint_err_paste_signed: Paste your signed tx hex from the wallet.
mint_err_signed_hex: Signed tx must be hex (0-9, a-f).
mint_err_too_short: This hex is too short to be a signed transaction — it looks like the unsigned tx from step 4. Sign it in your wallet first, then paste the signed version.
mint_err_unsigned: This is the unsigned transaction. Sign it in your wallet first, then paste the signed hex here.
mint_discard_confirm: Discard this draft? You will lose any progress in the current wizard.
mint_err_icon_size: Icon must be ≤ 2 MiB (matches the icon-safety pipeline cap).
mint_err_icon_key: Paste your IPFS provider API key first (same widget as below).
mint_err_ipfs_key: Paste your IPFS provider API key first.
mint_mint_as_b: . The genesis tx will be signed by that address; it must hold a UTXO with enough BCH to cover the genesis output + fees (typically 2000-3000 sats).
